name: Spectra Strobe

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A6FE8711-2B99-11F0-AFEE-42010A37C004

comment:
Spectra Strobe is a 1-metre-long, IP65-rated strobe bar for temporary outdoor use. It has 360 1W white LEDs and 384 0.5W RGB LEDs to create powerful and colourful flash and wash effects. It allows you to control 12 sections of white LEDs and 24 sections of RGB LEDs via DMX. The LED bar has a wide beam angle. The optionally available beam shapers enable you to change the beam angle to 15deg, 20deg or 10deg x 40deg.

The Spectra Strobe runs stand-alone with multiple built-in presets and effects, in master/slave mode and in 3-, 9-, 21-, 35-, 49- and 91-channel DMX mode with RDM support. The quick lock system allows you to easily connect multiple units in horizontal or vertical direction, or suspend the LED bar horizontally under a truss. For vertical mounting the optional Vertical Bracket for Showtec Spectra series is required. With the optional Base Plate for Showtec Spectra series and one Vertical Bracket you can stack up to two Spectra fixtures vertically on the stage floor. It is also possible to stack two LED bars or attach them to the Showtec Spectra Wash using the quick lock system. Two quick lock brackets and a Power Pro True cable are included. Barndoors are available as an option.
